positive: A vibrant, stylized minimalist illustration of a group of interconnected planets and constellations forming an abstract cosmic floral pattern. The central composition features Saturn's rings depicted as blooming lilies, and Jupiter's cloud bands rendered as geometric petal shapes. The style should be neo-traditional fine line illustration mixed with celestial vaporwave aesthetics, using high contrast black lines and vibrant neon blues, deep purples, and cosmic turquoises against a clean off-white background. Emphasize clean silhouettes, symmetrical balance, and smooth color gradients suitable for screen printing on apparel. The composition must fill the frame symmetrically.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifact, text, logo, watermark, messy, clutter, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, negative space, signature
